body:
## Summary
- import the validate-content focus registry before heavy validator imports and reject unknown `--focus-*` flags early
- route existing focused validator branches through `focusedValidationRequested()` ids
- extend the registry/test coverage so all current focus flags in scripts/tests are registered and unknown focus flags fail before TypeScript/project modules load

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' PATH=/home/billy/sct-worktrees/manager-content-remove-ads-mock-owned/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' PATH=/home/billy/sct-worktrees/manager-content-remove-ads-mock-owned/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-content-exec-cwd`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' PATH=/home/billy/sct-worktrees/manager-content-remove-ads-mock-owned/node_modules/.bin:$PATH node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-not-real; status=$?; test $status -eq 1`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' PATH=/home/billy/sct-worktrees/manager-content-remove-ads-mock-owned/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run validate:content`
- `PATH=/home/billy/sct-worktrees/manager-content-remove-ads-mock-owned/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1 HEAD`
title: test: centralize validate-content focus registry
